subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: There is a spiritual language and that is one language. It is a language by which the hearts speak to one another.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech, @love of God, @poems and quotation from poetry
